items.title: Sky Mavis, the developer behind Axie Infinity has entered into a strategic partnership with Act Games.
items.summary:
Sky Mavis, the developer behind Axie Infinity has entered into a strategic partnership with Act Games.

The partnership’s initial highlight is the migration of the iconic Zoids franchise to the Ronin blockchain.
